title: Asset
description: A media asset stored in the Contentstack asset library.

url.description: CDN URL to access the asset file.

filename.description: Original file name of the uploaded asset.

content_type.description: MIME type of the asset file.

file_size.description: File size of the asset in bytes.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the asset was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the asset was last updated.
